sections.paragraph:
συντεχνίτης, ου, ὁ (PAberd 59 III, 3 [IV/V a.d.], and freq. in late pap) one who follows the same trade ἄνδρες συντεχνῖται fellow-craftsman Ac 19:25 D.—DELG s.v. τέχνη.

PAberd PAberd = Catalogue of Greek and Latin Papyri and Ostraca in the Possession of the University of Aberdeen—List 4

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 975
